Rule.name: Toyota Azure AD Correlation
Rule.Description:
Identity Correlation Rules are used to find identities to which new accounts can be attached.
A correlation rule must return a Map with one of the specified Return arguments.

Argument.Description: Arguments passed to the aggregation task.
A sailpoint.object.ResourceObject returned from the collector.
The name of an Identity object.
A fully resolved Identity object if the rule wants to do its own queries to locate the identity.
The name of the extended attribute that can be used to locate an existing identity.
The value of the named extended attribute that can be used to locate an existing identity. This attribute is used together with the identityAttributeName argument.
